raw_consumer_statement: I sent a letter via XXXX mail on or about XX/XX/2023 to the following mailing address : Card Services XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  XXXX This was a request to open a dispute for a transaction with XXXX made XXXX XX/XX/2023 XXXX the amount of {$400.00} XXXX submitted this dispute within 30 days of the transaction.
